REQUEST BOT

———————————————————

Discord server! Join up!

———————————————————

There’s gonna be a lot of yapping here.

First of all, I’m really sorry for being so inconsistent with my bot posting. I just haven’t found the motivation to make new bots. I’m not quitting, nor do I plan to anytime soon. Just be aware that bots may come out less often.

Second of all, what the hell is going on with the big bot creators? I saw that Vex and Udo recently got banned, and while I didn’t use their bots nor like some of their community (at least not Udo’s from the hit that I saw), it’s still pretty big. Especially if it’s actually because of some false age accusations. I know the site moderation can be shitty sometimes (besides the dude who privated some old bots of mine, dude seems chill), but this is wild.

Anyways I’ll probably do the Toga request next. Whoever requested that cooked up a five star meal 🙏
